requirement: Compute nearest_tube_distance and park_proximity for all 29 active properties — alpha score spatial component

what_was_missing.nearest_tube_distance: 69% null — only original 9 seeded records had this
what_was_missing.park_proximity: 69% null — only original 9 seeded records had this
what_was_missing.commute_paternoster: 100% null — not used in alpha score, display only
what_was_missing.commute_canada_square: 40% null — not used in alpha score, display only

nearest_tube.method: TfL StopPoint API — lat/lon radius query
nearest_tube.returns: nearest tube station name + straight-line distance in metres

park_proximity.method: Hardcoded Grade II / notable London park nodes (OSM-sourced)
park_proximity.reason: Overpass API (OSM) had 504 Gateway Timeout — unreliable. Pre-defined park list is more stable.
park_proximity.note: Haversine distance used for park proximity estimate

commute_times.status: NOT COMPUTED — not used in alpha score, display only
commute_times.method_if_needed: Estimated as: walk_to_tube (nearest_tube_distance / 80 m/min) + tube journey time (known tube line segments)

realistic_price_bug.root_cause: realistic_price = area_£psqm × sqft_est, where sqft_est was wrong (FlareSolverr overestimate). list_price was later corrected by user, but realistic_price was not updated.
realistic_price_bug.fix: Set realistic_price = list_price for all 10 inflated cases (already fixed)
realistic_price_bug.policy: realistic_price = list_price on import. Only compute from sqft when sqft is MEASURED (floorplan or EPC). Never from FlareSolverr estimates.

scripts_created.enrich_spatial.py: geocode + nearest_tube + nearest_park for all records missing tube/park data
